mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 5% signals tightening labor markets, increasing corporate profit margins and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in < 40% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or UNRATE declines without corresponding equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and GDP signals expanding supply-side capacity, reducing inflationary pressures and enabling positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.05 for any 3-year window, or 20-day returns in high INDPRO/GDPC1 growth periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts above 600k units signals robust demand for construction, boosting related sectors and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in < 35% of triggered instances despite positive signal, or HOUST rises without corresponding equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in CPI inflation below 2% signals stable price expectations, reducing equity risk premiums and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in < 30% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or CPIAUCSL declines without corresponding equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in both the federal funds rate and CPI inflation signal aggressive monetary easing, reducing real interest rates and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.04 for any 2-year window, or 20-day returns in dual easing periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the federal funds rate above 4% signals monetary tightening, increasing discount rates and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in < 25% of triggered instances despite positive signal, or FEDFUNDS rises without corresponding equity losses.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in consumer spending (RSAFS) above 350 billion dollars signals strong demand, boosting corporate revenues and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in < 45% of triggered instances despite positive signal, or RSAFS rises without corresponding equity gains.
